ddls:
CREATE TABLE "volunteers" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the volunteer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the volunteer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the volunteer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer registered */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the volunteer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the volunteer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the volunteer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the volunteer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the volunteer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the volunteer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., over 18, free of charge) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_skills" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Proficiency level of the volunteer in the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id", "skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the opportunity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the opportunity */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization posting the opportunity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opportunity */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the opportunity */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the opportunity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer registered for the opportunity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "privacy_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "store_data" INTEGER /* Whether the volunteer allows data storage */,
  "share_data" INTEGER /* Whether the volunteer allows data sharing */,
  "contact_email" INTEGER /* Whether the volunteer allows contact via email */,
  "contact_phone" INTEGER /* Whether the volunteer allows contact via phone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_privacy_preferences_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_volunteer_id FOREIGN KEY ("volunteer_id") REFERENCES volunteers ("volunteer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_group_memberships" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the volunteer */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the volunteer in the group (e.g., member, leader) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id", "group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunity_requirements" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity */,
  "requirement" TEXT /* Requirement for the opportunity (e.g., age, skill) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id", "requirement")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunity_tags" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag for the opportunity (e.g., environment, education) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id", "tag")
)
